headline: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
summary: Meta is developing "super sensing" smart glasses. They could continuously record audio and snap photos every few seconds. Users could query Meta AI about captured data.

headline: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
summary: Samsung offers a $30 credit for reserving upcoming Galaxy phones. New Galaxy Z Fold phones are expected at the July 22nd, 2026, Unpacked event. This allows savings on unannounced devices.

headline: Microsoft's Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox "reset" led to 3,200 layoffs and studio shifts. Obsidian Entertainment is now developing a new Fallout title. Multiple projects, including Avowed, were canceled.

headline: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: The Fiat Topolino is introduced as America's most affordable EV. It's extremely compact, smaller than a ping-pong table. The tiny electric vehicle has a top speed of 19mph.

headline: Total Eclipse of the Heart Singer Bonnie Tyler Has Died Aged of 75
summary: Power ballad singer Bonnie Tyler has passed away at 75. She was famous for "Total Eclipse of the Heart." Tyler also sang the rock epic "Holding Out for a Hero."

headline: Sony Settles With Fired Marathon Game Director Who Sued PlayStation and Bungie for More Than $200 Million, Adds Name to Credits
summary: Sony settled with former Marathon game director Christopher Barrett. Barrett had sued PlayStation and Bungie for over $200 million. He was accused of sexual misconduct but will now be added to Marathon's credits.

headline: id Software Was Reportedly 'Toying With' Pitches for a New Perfect Dark, a John Wick-Inspired Game, and More Before Layoffs
summary: id Software explored various game pitches before widespread layoffs. Ideas included a new Perfect Dark and a John Wick-inspired title. Over half the studio was affected by Microsoft's layoffs.

headline: College Football 27 Review
summary: The "College Football 27" game review is out. It marks the game's junior year release. The review suggests a quick start for the title.

headline: Why heatwaves hit women harder
summary: Experts highlight that heatwaves disproportionately affect women. There's a call for greater awareness of heat-related risks to women. Targeted protection efforts are urgently needed.

headline: Family's 'unimaginable loss' as mum and daughters found dead
summary: A mother and her daughters were found dead, causing "unimaginable loss." Bedfordshire Police are searching for Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, 45, also known as Mark. Investigation into the tragic deaths is ongoing.

headline: Disability benefit not fit for purpose, minister leading review says
summary: Sir Stephen Timms states current disability benefits are inadequate. He leads a review of Personal Independence Payments (PIP). Changes are needed for PIP in England and Wales.

headline: It was 'love at first sight' with their adopted baby - then they were told he may have been trafficked
summary: David and Ally adopted Marcus, fulfilling their dream of parenthood. They were later informed their adopted baby might have been trafficked. The couple now faces the risk of losing their child.
